message:
Running command: # Synthesis has been at item 83/176 since start. Check if Yosys is actually doing work
# or if it's stuck. Look at the process state.
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check if memory is growing (sign of progress)
ps -p 216314 -o pid,vsz,rss 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Look at the actual yosys synthesis log more carefully around the stuck point
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
echo "Lines around item 83 (the last logged decoder):"
sed -n '5700,5713p' "$SYNTH_LOG"
